DP.254.0000:
Everyone calls me the Ruin Maniac.
Or they used to call me that.\r
Now they call me the Digging Maniac.\f
I’ll just go on chipping away at
the rock wall a little at a time.\f
Do you know why? I’m a Ruin Maniac
who is fascinated by the UNOWN\r
and who also loves to dig!
DP.254.0001:
Everyone calls me the Ruin Maniac.
Or they used to call me that.\r
Now they call me the Digging Maniac.\f
I’ll just go on chipping away at
the rock wall a little at a time.\f
Do you know why? I’m a Ruin Maniac
who also loves to dig!\f
I need to bear down and pound my
way through the bedrock now.\f
I think I’m getting close to some
exciting and mysterious UNOWN.\f
It’s going to be messy.
You’d better go outside.
